title: Explosive Block [Enderite Mod]
description: Add Explosive Block, Weapon, Items, Recipe, New Trap for Enderite Mod
body:
This mod is add for Enderite Mod

This is my 5th project

I have a discord account

Join discord [Here](https://discord.gg/5BWTwGf8Rt)

Add Explosive Block, Weapon, New Items, Recipe, New Trap

Recipe tutorial in images: Sorry, I can't upload picture

Recipe tutorial download: in "Additional Files", trailer video and [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

Instructions on how to make my mod work:
